news.title: Moody's cuts rating on private credit fund run by KKR and Future Standard to junk as bad loans grow
news.title_cn: 由於不良貸款增加，穆迪將 KKR 和未來標準營運的私人信貸基金評級下調至垃圾級

news.title: Oil rises with Brent climbing back above $100 as optimism fades over Iran war de-escalation
news.title_cn: 由於伊朗戰爭緩和的樂觀情緒消退，布蘭特原油價格重回 100 美元上方，油價上漲

news.title: Gap says it will launch checkout within Google's Gemini, in an AI first from a major fashion company
news.title_cn: Gap 表示將在Google Gemini 內推出結帳功能，這是一家大型時尚公司首次採用人工智慧技術

news.title: EV battery startup pivots to defense industry amid Iran war, weak electric vehicle market
news.title_cn: 伊朗戰爭、電動車市場疲軟之際，電動車電池新創公司轉向國防工業

news.title: United ditches more economy seats to make room for bigger premium cabins with new layouts
news.title_cn: 美聯航放棄更多經濟艙座位，為採用新佈局的更大高級客艙騰出空間

news.title: Here are Tuesday's biggest analyst calls: Apple, Tesla, Microsoft, Oracle, CoreWeave, Ralph Lauren & more
news.title_cn: 以下是周二最重要的分析師電話會議：蘋果、特斯拉、微軟、甲骨文、CoreWeave、Ralph Lauren 等

news.title: ‘This is a first-world problem’: I can’t roll over my $800,000 401(k) from my prior employer. What did I do wrong?
news.title_cn: 「這是一個第一世界的問題」：我無法將我之前雇主提供的 80 萬美元 401(k) 轉存。我做錯了什麼？

news.title: The U.S. government is about to define what junk food is. But comparing soy milk and gummy bears is complicated.
news.title_cn: 美國政府即將定義什麼是垃圾食物。但豆奶和小熊軟糖的比較很複雜。
